top_signals.title: Oil Edges Lower as Traders Assess Renewed US-Iran Hostilities
top_signals.summary:
Oil edged lower as traders assessed renewed US strikes against Iran, with the limited scope of the hostilities prompting bets that energy shipments through the Persian Gulf will resume their recent recovery.
Leslie Palti-Guzman, founder at Energy Vista, discusses the outlook for energy as tensions ramp up in the Middle East. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: AI contracts, not bitcoin, now drive miner valuations, and Cipher and TeraWulf look cheap
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Trump Stops in UK to Switch Air Force One Planes (Video)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: US 30-Year Bond Auction Set to Draw Highest Yield in 20 Years
top_signals.summary: An auction of 30-year Treasury bonds Thursday is poised to draw the highest yield since at least 2006, underscoring how swelling bond supply is driving investors to demand higher returns from government debt.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Deep-sea mining threatens 60% of vent species: IUCN
top_signals.summary: Rare molluscs that could advance medicine and technology are increasingly at risk as seabed mineral extraction expands.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Royalty juniors seek higher value in metals rally
top_signals.summary: Smaller royalty firms like Ecora and Empress see rising metals prices and mine financing demand narrowing valuation gaps with major players.
